content.text: I'll help you set up the Cucumber test environment and verify the living documentation reproduces the original bug. Let me start by creating a plan and then executing the workflow.

todos.content: Set up environment with export TZ='America/Los_Angeles'
Run defects4j test to establish baseline and observe failure
Replace pom.xml with pom.template.jxpath.xml
Move requirement.feature to src/test/resources/
Create CucumberTest.java in org.apache.commons.jxpath.ri.model.dom package
Create StepDefs.java in steps package
Run mvn dependency:build-classpath and update defects4j.build.properties
Add pathelement to build.xml test classpath
Run verification phase 1 - defects4j compile and mvn test -Dtest=CucumberTest with expected failure
Switch to fixed version and copy necessary files
Apply temporal bridge to fixed version using shell commands
Run verification phase 2 and confirm all tests pass
Complete final report

    Given a DOM model with a root element named "vendor"
    When I evaluate the XPath "//vendor"
    Then the result should be a pointer to the "vendor" Element
